title: The Dragon Wagon
company: three brilliant actor/musicians set on a brightly coloured rotating caravan. Packed with puppetry, laughter and live, original music. Bring a blanket to sit on.
description: Gorm / Dragon Whisperer: Catty TuckerNerthus / Evil Queen: Molly WolffBaugi / Sir Boghead Butterfingers / The Nearly There Troll: Maira VandiverCreated by Jellyfish Theatre from an original idea by Sarah SimpsonDirected by Sarah Simpson and Susannah CannMusic by Catty TuckerMovement by Anna NichollsWagon and Giant Dragon puppet by Mike PattisonWagon painted by Robin Aslett
